caption: A man wearing a large, grey, spiky wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones speaks while seated in a studio. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a bow tie and light-colored suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous small, framed photographs. To his side, a white piece of equipment is visible. A red and white logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man continues to talk, with subtle shifts in his facial expressions and mouth movements as he speaks, while his general posture and the surrounding environment remain constant.
